title: Terminally Ill Adults (End of Life) Bill: equality impact assessment
body: "The equality impact assessment (EQIA) (as introduced to the House of Lords) considers equalities impacts in relation to the Terminally Ill Adults (End of Life) Bill, as amended in the House of Commons.  The previous EQIA (and summary) considered equality impacts in relation to the bill as amended after the Commons public bill committee stage.  See the Parliament website for all other documents relating to the bill, including the PDF version of the full EQIA.  "
